subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: Every one receiving these instructions will think, 'How like my own religion!' This is because they are so broad that they include all truths; and all religions are built upon the same foundation.
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @oneness; unity of religion, @outward and inward meanings
